title: AI Document Verification Platform
subtitle: Docs Intelligence System
description: AI-driven document verification system to automate validation of large-scale candidate application documents using LLMs, VQA, and OCR.
points: Automated validation of large-scale documents using LLMs, VQA models, and OCR pipelines.
Built RAG workflows with LangChain and vector embeddings for contextual understanding.
Processed 15,000+ documents within 2 days with 90%+ accuracy, reducing weeks of manual work.

title: AI Customer Support Chatbot
subtitle: AI Advertisement Chatbot
description: Intelligent AI chatbot to handle customer queries related to advertisement services, reducing dependency on manual support.
points: Implemented a RAG conversational system for retrieving information from advertisement knowledge bases.
Integrated LLM inference with vector embeddings for accurate and context-aware responses.
Enabled automated query resolution through AI-driven conversational workflows.

title: Patient Management Chatbot
subtitle: Healthcare AI assistant
description: LLM-powered healthcare assistant using RAG architecture for semantic retrieval of patient records with low-latency Groq API.
points: Developed an LLM-powered assistant using RAG to help doctors efficiently access patient history.
Implemented semantic search using vector embeddings and structured medical data indexing.
Integrated Groq API for low-latency LLM inference enabling real-time patient data summarization.
